title: Victorian Teachers Strike Update: Schools Close and Classrooms Empty
description: Reports indicate thousands of Victorian teachers are striking, causing school closures and empty classrooms as they protest a pay deal.

sources.title: Victorian teachers 'need relief' as thousands take to the streets
sources.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation

sources.title: Classrooms empty across Victoria as teachers strike again
Victorian teachers strike LIVE: Schools to close to students as teachers walk off job to protest pay deal

sections.heading: School Closures and Empty Classrooms
paragraphs: According to Nine.com.au, classrooms are empty across Victoria as teachers strike again. The Age reports that schools are closing to students as teachers walk off the job.

sections.heading: Reasons for the Strike
paragraphs: The Age states that the walkout is intended to protest a pay deal. Additionally, ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation reports that Victorian teachers 'need relief' as thousands take to the streets.

sections.heading: Live Coverage
paragraphs: The Age is providing live coverage of the situation, highlighting the industrial action taking place across the state.

faq.a: According to The Age, teachers are walking off the job to protest a pay deal. ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation adds that teachers 'need relief.'

faq.q: What is the impact on schools?
faq.a: Nine.com.au reports that classrooms are empty across Victoria. The Age notes that schools are closing to students due to the strike.

news_coverage.title: Victorian teachers 'need relief' as thousands take to the streets
news_coverage.source: ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting Corporation

news_coverage.title: Classrooms empty across Victoria as teachers strike again
